sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: Brother of a groom in Zhang Liao’s service, when his brother was punished by Zhang Liao and wished to kill his master, Taischi Ci sent Ge Ding to help. Able to get into the city, Ge Ding and brother planned to start a fire then create a panic so they could get to Zhang Liao and kill him. Zhang Liao knew it was some malcontents and not the whole city so didn’t panic, waiting till Li Dian brought in Ge Ding, after a few questions, Ge Ding was executed with his brother.

full_text:
Ge Ding
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ge Ding. Served Taishi Ci, tried to kill Zhang Liao but was caught by Li Dian. Ge Ding may not have existed in history. Ge Ding was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Ge Ding lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

Short Biography
Served Taishi Ci, tried to kill Zhang Liao but was caught by Li Dian.
Details
Wade-GilesKo Ting
Literary Appearances
Romance of the Three Kingdoms:53
BiographySanguo Yanyi
Brother of a groom in Zhang Liao’s service, when his brother was punished by Zhang Liao and wished to kill his master, Taischi Ci sent Ge Ding to help. Able to get into the city, Ge Ding and brother planned to start a fire then create a panic so they could get to Zhang Liao and kill him. Zhang Liao knew it was some malcontents and not the whole city so didn’t panic, waiting till Li Dian brought in Ge Ding, after a few questions, Ge Ding was executed with his brother.
